# terrible_community_aws_directconnect_virtual_interface (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `id_to_associate` (String) The ID of the link aggregation group or connection to associate with the virtual interface.
- `state` (String) The desired state of the Direct Connect virtual interface.

### Optional

- `address_type` (String) The type of IP address for the BGP peer.
- `amazon_address` (String) The amazon address CIDR with which to create the virtual interface.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authentication_key` (String) The authentication key for BGP configuration.
- `bgp_asn` (Number) The autonomous system (AS) number for Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) configuration.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cidr` (String) A list of route filter prefix CIDRs with which to create the public virtual interface.
- `customer_address` (String) The customer address CIDR with which to create the virtual interface.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `direct_connect_gateway_id` (String) The direct connect gateway ID for creating a private virtual interface. To create a private virtual interface *virtual_gateway_id* or *direct_connect_gateway_id* is required. These options are mutually exclusive.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `name` (String) The name of the virtual interface.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `public` (Boolean) The type of virtual interface.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `virtual_gateway_id` (String) The virtual gateway ID required for creating a private virtual interface. To create a private virtual interface *virtual_gateway_id* or *direct_connect_gateway_id* is required. These options are mutually exclusive.
- `virtual_interface_id` (String) The virtual interface ID.
- `vlan` (Number) The VLAN ID.

### Read-Only

- `address_family` (String) The address family for the BGP peer.
- `asn` (Number) The autonomous system (AS) number for Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) configuration.
- `auth_key` (String) The authentication key for BGP configuration.
- `bgp_peers` (String) A list of the BGP peers configured on this virtual interface.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `connection_id` (String) The ID of the connection. This field is also used as the ID type for operations that use multiple connection types (LAG, interconnect, and/or connection).
- `customer_router_config` (String) Information for generating the customer router configuration.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `location` (String) Where the connection is located.
- `owner_account` (String) The AWS account that will own the new virtual interface.
- `route_filter_prefixes` (String) A list of routes to be advertised to the AWS network in this region (public virtual interface).
- `virtual_interface_name` (String) The name of the virtual interface assigned by the customer.
- `virtual_interface_state` (String) State of the virtual interface (confirming, verifying, pending, available, down, rejected).
- `virtual_interface_type` (String) The type of virtual interface (private, public).
